messages.message: Invalid transferFunction in basic DFD block. For an sRGB VkFormat it must be KHR_DF_TRANSFER_SRGB.
messages.details: DFD block #1 transferFunction in basic DFD block is KHR_DF_TRANSFER_LINEAR but for VkFormat VK_FORMAT_ETC2_R8G8B8A8_SRGB_BLOCK it must be KHR_DF_TRANSFER_SRGB.

messages.message: Invalid sample qualifierLinear for linear or unspecified transfer function in the basic DFD block.
messages.details: DFD block #1 sample #1 qualifierLinear is 1 but for KHR_DF_TRANSFER_LINEAR it must be 0.
